samples.xml_description:
<module id="traffic_light">
	<!-- TODO: Please modify this file. -->
	
	<description>A simple traffic light controller with a pedestrian crosswalk.</description>
	<ports>
		<input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
		<input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
		<input id="pass_request">Request signal for allowing vehicles to pass.</input>
		<output id="clock" width_description="[7:0]">An 8-bit output representing the count value of the internal counter.</output>
		<output id="red">Red output signal.</output>
		<output id="yellow">Yellow output signal.</output>
		<output id="green">Green output signal.</output>
	endports
	
	<parameter_description>
		idle = 2'd0;
		s1_red = 2'd1;
		s2_yellow = 2'd2;
		s3_green = 2'd3;
	endparameter_description
	
	
	<logic_description type="sequential_logic">
		reg [7:0] cnt;
		reg [1:0] state;
		reg p_red;
		reg p_yellow;
		reg p_green;
		
		initial begin
			cnt = 8'd0;
			state = 2'd0;
			p_red = 1'd0;
			p_yellow = 1'd0;
			p_green = 1'd0;
		end
		
		always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)begin
			if(!rst_n)begin
				state <= 2'd0;
			end else begin
				case(state)
					idle : begin
						state <= s1_red;
					end
					
					s1_red : begin
						if(cnt == 8'd3)begin
							state <= s3_green;
						end else begin
							state <= s1_red;
						end
					end
				
					s2_yellow : begin
						if(cnt == 8'd3)begin
							state <= s1_red;
						end else begin
							state <= s2_yellow;
						end
					end
				
					s3_green : begin
						if(cnt == 8'd3)begin
							state <= s2_yellow;
						end else begin
							state <= s3_green;
						end
					end
			
					default : begin
						state <= idle;
					end
				endcase
			end
		end
		
		always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)begin
			if(!rst_n)begin
				cnt <= 8'd10;
			end else begin
				if(pass_request && green)begin
					cnt <= 8'd10;
				end else begin
					case(state)
						idle : begin
							cnt <= 8'd10;
						end
						
						s1_red : begin
							if(p_green && !green)begin
								cnt <= 8'd60;
							end else begin
								cnt <= cnt - 1'd1;
							end
						end
					
						s2_yellow : begin
							if(p_green && !green)begin
								cnt <= 8'd60;
							end else begin
								cnt <= cnt - 1'd1;
							end
						end
					
						s3_green : begin
							if(p_green && !green)begin
								cnt <= 8'd60;
							end else begin
								cnt <= cnt - 1'd1;
							end
						end
					endcase
				end
			end
		end
		
		assign clock = cnt;
		
		
		always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)begin
			if(!rst_n)begin
				p_red <= 1'd0;
				p_yellow <= 1'd0;
				p_green <= 1'd0;
			end else begin
				p_red <= red;
				p_yellow <= yellow;
				p_green <= green;
			end
		end
		
	endlogic_description
	
	<implementation>
		//TODO: Please implement this module.
		//For example,
		//assign led = ~led;
	endimplementation
	
	<task>
		//TODO: Implement any additional functions you may need here.
	endtask
endmodule
